name: 𓆩♱𓆪 skeet [itzskeet_playz]
description:
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘‎

A new country meant a new start, but all it brought was silence. Hallways full of noise, yet no one really saw you. Every attempt at fitting in faded fast, and you ended up walking back home alone like the usual.

There was nothing particularly inviting about him, quite the opposite, actually… and yet, you started walking towards him without a second of hesitation.

-

(This kinda sucks burp I might rewrite it maybe. Art by killurfavs on twt)

This is loosely based on one of Skeet's diary entries but it's written to work with any POV, a Matt persona would probably work best though

‎3/11 update: added a second initial message to fulfill a request, you may access it by clicking on the right arrow at the bottom of the first message.

Also fixed the grammatical mistakes in the first initial message that I hadn't previously noticed. (You people are FAKE!! for not pointing them out earlier, now I'm embarrassed 😔)

Thx for almost 42k chats!!!! Love you all! (⁠ʃ⁠ƪ⁠＾⁠3⁠＾⁠）

Holy Moly that's a lot of chats...
